untranslatable_reason: Pattern formation criteria for broadening pattern not specified in source text. Broadening pattern detection requires specific price swing analysis (identification of expanding highs and lows) which cannot be expressed with available indicators. Used Donchian channels as a proxy for breakout detection, but this does not capture the underlying broadening pattern structure. Market context assessment (bull/bear via S&P 500) not implementable in single-asset backtest framework. Exit conditions (ultimate high/low reference points, stop placement, target price) explicitly marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source.
translation_notes: Substituted Donchian breakout logic as proxy for broadening pattern breakout since pattern recognition criteria unavailable. ADX added to detect breakout momentum. Hold period set to 14 days based on partial data showing 29% frequency within 2 weeks for bull+upward case. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal but implemented as dual entry/exit logic. Stop loss and target price computation left undefined per source material.
